title: The Tomb of the Sunken King
main_character: Kaelen, an agile and resourceful tomb raider.
lore_and_rules: The Tomb is cursed. Magic items glow when near danger. Kaelen is mortal and must rely on stealth and tools rather than brute strength.
starting_inventory: [Status] Health: Good. Items: Rusty Dagger, Backpack (empty), Rope (30ft), Torch (unlit). State: None.

plot_outline.title: The Overgrown Gates
plot_outline.setting: The humid, vine-choked ruins outside the Tomb. Twilight.
plot_outline.goal: Find the 'Moonstone Key' hidden in the outer ruins, and use it to unlock the heavy stone doors to enter the Tomb.
plot_outline.obstacles: A territorial shadow-panther prowls the ruins. Pit traps are hidden under the leaves. The door mechanism is heavily rusted.

plot_outline.title: The Hall of Whispers
plot_outline.setting: Inside the Tomb. A dark, echoing stone corridor. The floor is covered in crunchy bone debris.
plot_outline.goal: Sneak past the blind Spectral Guardian, retrieve the 'Sun Shield' from the central pedestal, and reach the stairs leading down.
plot_outline.obstacles: The Spectral Guardian is blind but has incredible hearing. Stepping on the bone debris makes loud noises. The room is pitch black.

plot_outline.title: The Flooded Throne
plot_outline.setting: The flooded throne room of the Sunken King. Water is waist-deep.
plot_outline.goal: Use the Sun Shield to deflect the King's magic, steal the 'Golden Crown' from his skeletal head, and escape back up the stairs.
plot_outline.obstacles: The Sunken King awakens and casts necrotic spells. The freezing water slows movement. The exit stairs begin to collapse during the escape.

author: dobrado76
